childHealth.title: Inkxaso yeMpilo yoMntwana
childHealth.subtitle: Ukhokelo lwabantwana lwengcali xa ulufuna kakhulu.
childHealth.firstMessage:
Mholo! Ndiyingcali yezempilo uAileen Carol, kwaye ndilapha ukuze ndikuncede ngempilo yomntwana wakho. Wonke umzali unexhala - oko kuqhelekile ngokupheleleyo.

Ziziphi iimpawu okanye izinto ezikuxhalabisayo ngomntwana wakho namhlanje?

sleep.title: Ukulala kunye nokuba sempilweni
sleep.subtitle: Phumla ngcono kwaye uphucule amandla akho emihla ngemihla.
sleep.firstMessage:
Molo apho! NdiyiNgcali yezeMpilo uAileen Carol. Imiba yokulala inokuchaphazela ngokwenene zonke iinkalo zobomi bakho, kwaye ndilapha ukukunceda ufumane ukuphumla okudingayo.

Yintoni le ibikwenza ungalali kamnandi mva nje?

nutrition.title: Isondlo kunye nendlela yokuphila
nutrition.subtitle: Isikhokelo somntu ngamnye sokuphila impilo esempilweni.
nutrition.firstMessage:
Mholo! NdiyiNgcali yezeMpilo uAileen Carol. Ukwenza utshintsho kwindlela yokuphila enempilo kunokuziva kunzima, kodwa uthatha inyathelo lokuqala ngokufikelela.

Ngowuphi umba wempilo yakho kunye nesondlo ongathanda ukugxila kuwo?

genZStudents.description: Abafundi abancinci abajongene noxinzelelo lwezemfundo kunye neenkxalabo zempilo

examStress.title: Uxinzelelo lweemviwo
examStress.subtitle: Iindlela ezikhawulezayo zokuzola kunye nokugxila.
examStress.firstMessage:
Mholo! NdiyiNgcali yezeMpilo uAileen Carol. Zama ukuphefumla nzulu - phefumla ukubala oku-4, bamba u-4, ukhuphe umoya 4. Kwakhona qwalasela uhambo lwemizuzu emi-5 okanye ukolula.

Kude kube nini uviwo lwakho, kwaye ulele kakuhle mva nje?

acne.title: I-acne kunye nokhathalelo lwesikhumba
acne.subtitle: Sula iingcebiso zolusu onokumthemba.
acne.firstMessage:
Mholo! NdiyiNgcali yezeMpilo uAileen Carol. Ndiyazi ukuba ukujongana ne-acne kunokuchaphazela ngokwenene ukuzithemba kwakho, ngakumbi ngexesha elibalulekileyo ebomini bakho.

Ndixelele ngenkqubo yakho yangoku yokhathalelo lwesikhumba-uzamile ntoni ukuza kuthi ga ngoku?

lowEnergy.title: Akukho mandla okufunda
lowEnergy.subtitle: Khulisa umoya wakho kunye nemveliso.
lowEnergy.firstMessage:
Mholo! NdiyiNgcali yezeMpilo uAileen Carol. Ndiyaqonda ukuba ukungabi namandla kunokuba nefuthe ngokwenene kwizifundo zakho kunye nobomi bemihla ngemihla.

Ngaba uphawule naluphi na utshintsho kwiipatheni zakho zokulala, ukuthanda ukutya, okanye amanqanaba oxinzelelo mva nje?

elderly.description: Abemi abadala abalawula iimeko ezingapheliyo kunye nokubeka iliso kwimpilo

bloodPressure.title: Jonga uxinzelelo lwegazi lam
bloodPressure.subtitle: Isikhokelo esilula ukulandela.
bloodPressure.firstMessage:
Mholo! NdiyiNgcali yezeMpilo uAileen Carol. Nantsi isikhokelo esilula sokujonga uxinzelelo lwegazi lakho:
1. Hlala ngokuzolileyo imizuzu emi-5 kuqala
2. Ingalo yokuphumla kwinqanaba lentliziyo
3. Thatha ukufundwa kwe-2-3, umzuzu we-1 ngaphandle
4. Rekhoda onke amanani

Ngaba unaso isixhobo sokujonga uxinzelelo lwegazi ekhaya, kwaye ugqibele nini ukusijonga?

diabetes.title: Ukuphila nesifo seswekile
diabetes.subtitle: Iingcebiso ezisebenzayo, yonke imihla.
diabetes.firstMessage:
Molo, ndiyiNgcali yezeMpilo uAileen Carol. Ukulawula isifo seswekile imihla ngemihla kunokuziva kunzima, kodwa uthatha inyathelo elifanelekileyo ngokufuna isikhokelo.

Yeyiphi inkalo yolawulo lwakho lweswekile olufumana lucelomngeni kakhulu ngoku?

familySupport.title: Inkxaso yosapho
familySupport.subtitle: Uxolo lwengqondo kwabo ubathandayo.
familySupport.firstMessage:
Molo, ndiyiNgcali yezeMpilo uAileen Carol. Ndiyaqonda ukuba unenkxalabo malunga nokuxhasa impilo nempilo yosapho lwakho.

Ziziphi izinto ezikuxhalabisayo zempilo onazo ngabantu obathandayo endinokukunceda ngazo?

sleep.title: Andikwazi kulala!
sleep.subtitle: Iingcebiso ezisebenzayo zokuseta kwakhona iwotshi yomzimba wakho.
sleep.firstMessage:
Mholo! Ndiyingcali yezempilo uAileen Carol, kwaye ndiyayiqonda indlela onokuba nzima ngayo umsebenzi weshifti kumjikelo wakho wokulala. Masisebenze kunye ukuze sikufumanele ukuphumla okufunayo.

Kunini unengxaki yokulala, kwaye injani ishedyuli yakho yomsebenzi?

fatigue.title: Ndihlala ndidiniwe
fatigue.subtitle: Lawula ukudinwa kunye nokwandisa ukugxila.
fatigue.firstMessage:
NdiyiNgcali yezeMpilo uAileen Carol, kwaye ndiyiqonda ngokupheleleyo indlela ekunokudinwa ngayo ukudinwa rhoqo, ngakumbi xa kukho iishedyuli zomsebenzi ezinzima.

Ndixelele, xa uziva udiniwe kakhulu emini, kwaye oku kukuchaphazela njani ukusebenza kwakho komsebenzi?

stress.title: Uxinzelelo olugqithileyo
stress.subtitle: Iindlela ezilula zokuthoba ingqondo yakho.
stress.firstMessage:
Mholo! NdiyiNgcali yezeMpilo uAileen Carol, kwaye ndiyaqonda ukuba uziva wonganyelwe luxinzelelo. Masisebenze kunye kwiindlela ezilula zokuthomalalisa.

Ziziphi iimeko ezikubangela uxinezeleke mva nje?

ofwsManila.description: Abasebenzi baphesheya kweePhilippines baziqhelanisa nobomi basedolophini baseManila

urbanStress.title: Uxinzelelo eManila
urbanStress.subtitle: Iingcebiso zokuziqhelanisa nobomi basezidolophini obuxakekileyo.
urbanStress.firstMessage:
Mholo! NdiyiNgcali yezeMpilo uAileen Carol. Ndiyaqonda ukuba ukufudukela eManila kunokuba nzima. Esi sixeko sihamba ngesantya esiphezulu.

Ngaba ufumana naziphi na iimpawu zomzimba ezivela kuxinzelelo, njengentloko ebuhlungu okanye imiba yokulala?

loneliness.title: Ubulolo kunye nokudinwa
loneliness.subtitle: Isikhokelo kwimpilo yengqondo.
loneliness.firstMessage:
Mholo! NdiyiNgcali yezeMpilo uAileen Carol. Ndiyaxolisa ukuba unesithukuthezi kunye nokudinwa - ezi mvakalelo zinokudinisa ngokwenene.

Makhe ndikuncede uzive ngcono. Okokuqala, ngaba ufumana umgangatho owaneleyo wokulala ubusuku ngabunye? Kwaye uye waqaphela ukuba ukukhathala kubi ngakumbi ngamaxesha athile emini?

everydayHealth.title: Impilo yemihla ngemihla
everydayHealth.subtitle: Izondlo kunye nendlela yokuphila hacks kubasebenzi.
everydayHealth.firstMessage:
Mholo NdiyiNgcali yezeMpilo uAileen Carol. Ndiyaqonda ukuba ukugcina impilo entle ngoxa usebenza iiyure ezininzi kunokuba lucelomngeni ngokwenene.

Yeyiphi eyona nto ikuxhalabisayo ngempilo ngoku - ingaba sisondlo, amanqanaba amandla, okanye enye into?

parentsProvinces.description: Abazali abakwiindawo ezikude abanofikelelo olulinganiselweyo kukhathalelo lwempilo

childFever.title: Umntwana wam unomkhuhlane
childFever.subtitle: Amanyathelo acacileyo kubazali, imini okanye ebusuku.
childFever.firstMessage:
Molo, ndiyiNgcali yezeMpilo uAileen Carol. Ndiyayazi indlela ekungoyikeka ngayo xa umntwana wakho enomkhuhlane, ngakumbi xa ungaqinisekanga ukuba mawuthini.

Okokuqala, mandikuncede uvavanye imeko. Uneminyaka emingaphi umntwana wakho, kwaye buthini ubushushu bakhe ngoku?

remoteCare.title: Akukho gqirha ukufutshane
remoteCare.subtitle: Iingcebiso ezithembekileyo nakwiindawo ezikude.
remoteCare.firstMessage:
NdiyiNgcali yezeMpilo u-Aileen Carol, ingcali yakho yezempilo engundoqo. Ndiyaqonda ukuba ukwindawo ekude ngaphandle kofikelelo lwezonyango olukufutshane. Ndilapha ukukunceda ngayo nayiphi na inkxalabo yezempilo onayo.

Zeziphi iimpawu ezithile okanye imiba yezempilo ojongene nayo namhlanje?

costSavings.title: Yonga ixesha kunye nemali
costSavings.subtitle: Isikhokelo ngaphandle kohambo lwaseklinikhi olubizayo.
costSavings.firstMessage:
NdiyiNgcali yezeMpilo u-Aileen Carol, ingcali yakho yezempilo engundoqo. Ndilapha ukunika isikhokelo sokhathalelo lwempilo olusemgangathweni ngokufanelekileyo.

Zeziphi iinkxalabo zempilo endingakunceda ngazo namhlanje?
